Add Passkey Modal / Error Cancelled.defaultMessage: Registration was cancelled or timed out. Please try again.

Add Passkey Modal / Not Supported.defaultMessage: Your browser does not support passkeys (WebAuthn).

Add Passkey Modal / Register Description.defaultMessage: When prompted, use Touch ID, Face ID, or your security key to register.

Add Passkey Modal / Success Description.defaultMessage: You can now use this passkey to sign in securely without a password.

Add Passkey Modal / Works With Descripti.defaultMessage: Touch ID, Face ID, Windows Hello, Android Fingerprint, and hardware security keys like YubiKey.

Add SSO Modal / Help Description.defaultMessage: SAML 2.0 is recommended for enterprise IdPs like Okta and Azure AD. OIDC is simpler and works well with Google Workspace and modern identity providers.

Add SSO Modal / Issuer Tip.defaultMessage: Tip: Make sure the Issuer URL includes https:// (e.g., https://your-tenant.us.auth0.com/)

Add SSO Modal / Redirect URI Label OIDC.defaultMessage: After creating the connection, you'll receive the exact redirect URI to configure in your IdP.

Add SSO Modal / Redirect Warning.defaultMessage: Important: Update the callback URL in your identity provider settings with this exact URL, then activate the connection.

Add SSO Modal / SP Metadata Description.defaultMessage: After creating the connection, you'll receive the SP metadata URL to configure in your IdP.

Add SSO Modal / Subtitle.defaultMessage: Choose your SSO protocol to get started

Add SSO Modal / Subtitle Success.defaultMessage: Complete the setup in your identity provider

Add SSO Modal / Success Description.defaultMessage: Complete the setup by configuring your identity provider with the information below.

Admin / Feature 1 Description.defaultMessage: Application-level roles (USER/ADMIN) for global access control across the entire platform.

Admin / Feature 2 Description.defaultMessage: Multi-tenant roles (OWNER/ADMIN/MEMBER) for granular access within each organization.

Admin / Feature 3 Description.defaultMessage: Declarative route protection with automatic redirects and role-based component rendering.

Admin / Feature Multi Role Description.defaultMessage: Allow multiple roles with array syntax

Admin / Feature Redirect Description.defaultMessage: Unauthorized users are redirected to login or 404 page

Admin / Files Description.defaultMessage: Important files for understanding and extending the role-based access control system

Admin / Hero Description.defaultMessage: This page demonstrates the built-in role-based access control system. Only users with the ADMIN role can access this page. Regular users are automatically redirected.

Admin / How It Works Description.defaultMessage: This admin page is protected by the AuthRoute component configured with Role.ADMIN. The route definition in app.component.tsx looks like this:

Admin / How It Works Redirect.defaultMessage: When a non-admin user tries to access /admin, they are automatically redirected to the login page (if not logged in) or the 404 page (if logged in but not an admin).

Admin / Pro Tip Description.defaultMessage: Always verify permissions on the backend too. Frontend checks are for UX, not security.

Admin / Route Protection Description.defaultMessage: Wrap your routes with AuthRoute to restrict access based on user roles

Email / User Export / Text.defaultMessage: Dear User,{br}{br} We have received your request to export your personal data, in accordance with GDPR regulations. We have processed your request and your data has been compiled into a package that is now available for download. {br}{br} Please note that this package contains sensitive information and should be downloaded to a secure location. {br}{br} To download the package, please click on the download button below.
